n: The Glowering Trees of the Drownholt

steps.t: Nenedhel parted ways with Nífdir to the west of Estolad Mernael. Nenedhel, leader of the Malledhrim in the Drownholt, has asked you to seek Nífdir in …
Nenedhel is at Estolad Mernael, east of Nífdir's small camp. You should speak with Nenedhel and assure him that Nífdir is safe, but not yet ready to r…
